title: trisetum wolfii var. muticum
intro: Trisetum wolfii var. muticum is a variety of the Trisetum wolfii plant, a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is commonly known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, inflammation, and digestive issues. Trisetum wolfii var. muticum has been used to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu due to its antimicrobial and antipyretic properties. In herbal preparations, it can be consumed as tea, decoction, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
